channel.title: Resend RSS Feed
channel.description: Stay up to date with the latest news and insights from the Resend team.

item.title: Welcoming Mateusz Wos, our new Software Engineer
item.description: We're thrilled to share the news that Mateusz Wos is joining Resend.

item.title: Incident report for February 15, 2026
item.description: Detailed postmortem of the outage on February 15, 2026.

item.title: Email automation for OpenClaw
item.description: Automate email workflows for your OpenClaw account using Resend.

item.title: How to Create a DevTools Agent Skill
item.description: A practical engineering guide to creating an Agent Skill for a DevTool product.

item.title: Introducing Email Skills
item.description: Empower your AI Agents to create, send, and manage emails.

item.title: Why You Should Embrace the Promotions Tab
item.description: Gmail’s Promotions tab is not a penalty. It can improve engagement, protect sender reputation, and optimize long-term email performance.

item.title: Slater Smith, our new Customer Success Engineer
item.description: We're thrilled to share the news that Slater Smith is joining Resend.

item.title: Do You Need a Warmup Service?
item.description: Outsourcing warmup rarely works as advertised. Here's why you're better off managing it on your own.

item.title: Welcoming Zá Scalon, our new Brand Designer
item.description: We're thrilled to share the news that Zá Scalon is joining Resend.

item.title: How Replit Built Effortless Email Sending Features
item.description: Replit built straightforward email sending features using Resend, allowing builders to focus on creating without worrying about email infrastructure.

item.title: 1,000,000 users
item.description: The journey so far and the road ahead.

item.title: Top 10 new features in 2025
item.description: A recap of some of the best features Resend launched this year.

item.title: Welcoming Danilo Campos, our new Design Engineer
item.description: We're thrilled to share the news that Danilo Campos is joining Resend.

item.title: How Dub Uses Webhooks to Power Features
item.description: Dub transforms Webhooks from simple notifications into powerful product features that drive in-app messaging and growth, sending 5 million emails each month.

item.title: Incident report for November 18, 2025
item.description: Detailed postmortem of the outage on November 18, 2025.

item.title: Resend Forward 5: Wrap Up
item.description: Everything we launched during the fifth launch week.

item.title: One More (AI) Thing
item.description: Use AI to generate subjects, preview texts, and alt texts in multiple languages.

item.title: React Email 5.0
item.description: New updates to React Email for improved UX and DX.

item.title: Unsubscribe Topics
item.description: Give your users more control over their subscription preferences.

item.title: New Contacts Experience
item.description: Store custom properties on your contacts, track their activity, and segment them as you need.

item.title: Introducing Templates
item.description: Create, edit, and send emails with Templates.

item.title: Inbound Emails
item.description: Receive emails using webhooks. Parse content and attachments. Reply to your users.

item.title: $3M to Make Email Safer
item.description: Resend is committing to investing $3M to build the safest and most accessible email platform.

item.title: Hacktoberfest 2025
item.description: Join us in celebrating open source this Hacktoberfest.

item.title: Four Ways to Hurt Your Sender Reputation
item.description: Common mistakes that can hurt your email deliverability.

item.title: Resend MCP Hackathon
item.description: Explore the creative limits of using the Resend MCP to send emails

item.title: Welcoming Christina Martinez, our new Developer Experience Engineer
item.description: We're thrilled to share the news that Christina Martinez is joining Resend.

item.title: How to read a DMARC report
item.description: Learn how to read DMARC reports (RUA and RUF), interpret key XML fields, and use insights to protect your domain and improve email deliverability.

item.title: Welcoming Erin Levine, our new Chief of Staff
item.description: We're thrilled to share the news that Erin Levine is joining Resend.

item.title: How to Validate Form Inputs
item.description: How to engineer secure, user-friendly, bot-resistant form inputs

item.title: Engineering an AI App
item.description: Key principles to guide engineers building AI-first applications

item.description: We're thrilled to share the news that Lucas da Costa is joining Resend.

item.title: Welcoming Lucas Vieira, our new Software Engineer
item.description: We're thrilled to share the news that Lucas Vieira is joining Resend.

item.title: Resend acquires Briefer
item.description: An important step in evolving how Resend processes terabytes of data at scale.

item.title: How Raycast Modernized their Email Sending
item.description: Raycast shares their real-world story of migrating to Resend, highlighting a smoother DX, clean UI, and newfound confidence in email sending.

item.title: How to Get Email Consent
item.description: What it means to get email consent and how to ask for it properly.

item.title: DMARC Policy Modes
item.description: A practical guide to DMARC policy modes—none, quarantine, and reject—and what to expect when enforcing them.

item.title: Welcoming Gabriel Miranda, our new Software Engineer
item.description: We're thrilled to share the news that Gabriel Miranda is joining Resend.

item.title: Rebranding Resend
item.description: The unveil of Resend's new visual identity.

item.title: The 7 Best Email Verification APIs for Developers
item.description: A detailed analysis of the top email verification APIs for developers.

item.title: How DMARC Applies to Subdomains
item.description: Learn how the sp tag works, and when subdomain policies inherit or override the organizational domain.

item.title: Welcoming Pedro Gomes, our new Software Engineer
item.description: We're thrilled to share the news that Pedro Gomes is joining Resend.

item.title: Do You Need a Dedicated IP?
item.description: When it makes sense, when it backfires, and why domain reputation is most important.

item.title: The 6 best notification infrastructure services
item.description: An in-depth analysis of the top notification infrastructure solutions for developers.

item.title: The Fixer
item.description: How we leverage our success and engineering relationship to improve customer experience.

item.title: Why Your Emails are Going to Spam
item.description: Why emails are landing in the spam folder and what you can do about it.

item.title: Engineering Idempotency Keys
item.description: How we implemented idempotency keys in our email API.

item.title: Microsoft’s bulk sending requirements for 2025
item.description: Starting May 2025, Microsoft will be enforcing new bulk sending requirements.

item.description: We're thrilled to share the news that Rehan van der Merwe is joining Resend.

item.description: Recently, the email standard for displaying your company avatar in email clients, BIMI, underwent some positive changes. Here's how it impacts you.

item.description: We're excited to announce more efficient sending support for Asia users.

item.description: Add, update, retrieve, and remove contacts without having to worry about the entire unsubscribe flow.

item.description: Send and monitor emails from Supabase Auth using a custom SMTP server.

item.description: The importance of a 40-year-old protocol to the future of email.

item.description: All about the seven new features we launched in the last seven days.

item.description: Build beautiful emails with Tailwind CSS and React Email.

item.description: Track engagement and tune your sending approach with Resend's open and click tracking.

item.description: Announcing the first batch of Resend Integrations, including Novu, Knock, Trigger.dev, and Pipedream.

item.description: Behind the scenes of our redesigned domains experience with provider-specific instructions.

item.description: Learn how to receive real-time notifications about your email sending activities directly to your server.

item.description: Understand the benefits between dedicated IPs and shared IPs for email deliverability.

item.description: We're excited to announce support for multi-region email sending.

item.title: Lessons learned from growing a 6,338 people waitlist in 7 weeks
item.description: The challenges we faced and actionable tips for founders looking to build their own waitlist.

item.title: Why I spent $25,000 on a domain (or how to pick a startup name)
item.description: Thoughts on the importance of choosing a strong brand name, challenges of finding an available domain, and tips on how to better negotiate and acquire a domain.

item.title: Resend + Y Combinator
item.description: We're excited to announce that Resend is now backed by Y Combinator.

item.title: Introducing Resend
item.description: Why are we doing this? What problem are we solving? Why now?
